title: AI Engineer Agentic Systems
description:
Legg til som favoritt.
Dele ikon
AI Engineer Agentic Systems
DNB
Frist
26.04.2026
Ansettelsesform
Fast
Design and build multi-agent applications; orchestration, tools, memory and more
People are the very DNA of DNB. Since 1822, bright minds have worked together to find the best solutions for our customers. Today, DNB is much more than Norway's largest bank - we are a technology-driven financial institution that continuously connects people and ideas to knowledge and capital in new ways.
Diversity is part of who we are, and inclusion is something we actively choose every single day. We promise to do our best to make you feel at home. A job at Norway's largest financial group offers professional challenges in an exciting work environment with many opportunities for development.
AI Engineer Agentic Systems
About us
AI Tech is DNB's new division within Technology & Services, created to accelerate our shift from AI experimentation to real, measurable impact. We bring together deep technical expertise, modern AI platforms, and hands‑on delivery to scale agentic AI across the group. We move fast, learn fast, and deliver real outcomes.
We expect every member of AI Tech to be a role model in the everyday use of AI —using AI proactively in coding, automating tasks, improving documentation, and accelerating problem‑solving. You help raise the overall AI maturity across DNB by demonstrating what AI‑first engineering looks like.
What you will do
Design and build multi-agent applications; orchestration, tools, memory and more
Integrate agents with enterprise data systems and APIs via MCP and other patterns
Test models and configs; understanding trade-offs in cost, latency, and capability
Build evaluations; code, LLM and human evals with and without ground truth
Operationalize applications with top notch observability for drift detection
Contribute to shared patterns, templates, and reference repos for use across DNB
Background
Relevant background from engineering AI, Software or ML systems
Experienced coder with fluency in relevant languages like Python, Java or C#
Cloud competence across public cloud vendors like AWS, Azure and GCP
Familiarity with AI tooling for developer productivity (Claude Code, Copilot etc.)
Real experience with LLM-based systems — agents, RAG, tool-calling and similar
Familiarity with multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, Strands and similar)
Tech
stack example:
Python, Strands, AWS AgentCore, AWS Bedrock, MCP, Mlflow, OTel, Docker, GitHub Actions
What you bring
You bring a strong role‑model mindset and actively uplift your peers by demonstrating what AI‑first engineering looks like in practice. You are a systems thinker who designs robust, observable solutions, and you combine this with a clear bias for action and iterative delivery. You communicate and collaborate effectively across roles and teams, and you take true ownership to the team's goals.
What's in it for you?
You'll work on challenging and meaningful tasks in a strong engineering culture with solid opportunities for professional growth and career development. We offer attractive pension and insurance schemes, as well as employee benefits on DNB's products. You'll also have access to company cabins across Norway, sports, cultural and social activities, and a wide range of employee discounts. We support flexibility in everyday work through flexible working hours, a hybrid way of working, extra days off, and reduced working hours from May to August (summertime).
Contact Persons:
Mari Sand Frogner, Service Owner | Mari.Sand.Frogner@dnb.no | +47 41475454 / Olav Lognvik, Engineering Manager | Olav.Lognvik@dnb.no | +47 40019700
Application Deadline:
26.04.26
In this job application process, you only need to upload your resume (CV) and briefly answer some job-related questions. Cover letter is not required but you can upload this as an attachment if desired.
In DNB, we carry out background checks to verify that the information provided in your CV and other documentation is correct. Background checks are generally performed by an external independent third party. Former employers are typically contacted to check previous positions and periods of employment, while educational institutions are asked to confirm marks. No background check will be conducted without your prior consent, and you will receive more detailed information about this, if applicable. For positions that require an authorisation and/or approval of suitability, a police certificate of good conduct will be required.

C# (Programmeringsspråk)
Docker

MLFlow

Python (dataprogrammering)

Om arbeidsgiveren
En jobb i Norges største finanskonsern byr på faglige utfordringer i et spennende arbeidsmiljø med mange muligheter. Vi trenger medarbeidere med ulik bakgrunn og kompetanse. Vil du være med på laget?

Experienced coder with fluency in Python, Java, or C#

analysis.summary: An AI Engineer role at DNB, Norway's largest bank, focusing on designing, building, and operationalizing multi-agent AI applications. The role involves working with modern cloud platforms and AI tech stacks to drive DNB's shift towards AI-first engineering.
analysis.why_foreigner_friendly: The entire job advertisement is written in English, strongly indicating English as the primary working language. DNB is Norway's largest financial group, a very large company with the resources and infrastructure to sponsor work permits for international talent. The role is highly technical, focusing on international AI/ML tech stacks, and is located in Oslo, a major tech hub. There are no mentions of Norwegian language requirements or security clearance.
